name: copilotprompts-critical-thinking
title: Critical Thinking Agent
shortDescription: An agent that provides honest, critical answers and doesn't automatically agree with you.
longDescription: Based on an excellent video by Alicia Brown of Enovair Partners,
this agent is designed to provide honest, critical answers and avoid sycophantic behavior.

references.name: The Real Reason AI Won't Tell You You're Wrong - Until You Do This
references.description: Video by Alicia Brown of Enovair Partners on how to get honest, critical answers from AI.
